boot_check.stderr:
Usage of /private/tmp/gobench-eq-pytagoadapt:
  -go string
    	Go binary used for validation builds. (default "go")
  -gofmt string
    	gofmt binary used to format generated Go code. (default "gofmt")
  -input string
    	Path to the source Python file.
  -keep-work
    	Keep the working directory instead of deleting it after the run.
  -output string
    	Path to the adapted Go file.
  -pytago string
    	Pytago binary to run. (default "/tmp/venv-pytago310/bin/pytago")
  -skip-build
    	Skip go build validation.
  -work-dir string
    	Optional working directory. Defaults to a temporary directory.
